message:
fix(normalize): add iteration limit to prevent unbounded wrapper stripping

Add MAX_WRAPPER_ITERATIONS (32) limit to the wrapper stripping loop.
Previously, a maliciously crafted command with many alternating wrappers
like "sudo env env env sudo env ... git reset --hard" could cause
excessive CPU usage as the loop had no iteration bound.

The limit of 32 is generous for legitimate use (typical commands have
1-3 wrappers at most) while preventing DoS attacks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
